---
title: "Pemodelan Antrian: Sebuah Studi Kasus Pengubah Acak Diskrit"
subtitle: "Catatan Kuliah Probabilitas dan Statistika"  
bibliography: ref.bib 
format:
    typst:
        keep-typ: true
        include-before-body:
            - file:
                mouse.typ
---




{{< include ../index.qmd >}}

{{< include ../bab_1.qmd >}}

```{text}


{{< include ../bab_2.qmd >}}
{{< include ../bab_3.qmd >}}
{{< include ../bab_4.qmd >}}
{{< include ../bab_5.qmd >}}
{{< include ../bab_6.qmd >}}
{{< include ../bab_7.qmd >}}
{{< include ../bab_8.qmd >}}
{{< include ../bab_9.qmd >}}
{{< include ../bab_10.qmd >}}
{{< include ../bab_11.qmd >}}
{{< include ../bab_12.qmd >}}
{{< include ../bab_13.qmd >}}
{{< include ../bab_14.qmd >}}
```
